subject: Back from Europe tour
body:
Hallo Jeffrey!
Got back from London this morning. Did Zurich, Amsterdam and London in 2
days, then I was sent back to Dubai - COMMERCIAL - which was horrible. The
schedule was extended and my boss knew if they brought me, they would be
bringing back a dead body to Dubai. I was exhausted, but had a very
interesting time.

You should come to Dubai again. It's quite nice here.
Much love,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062

Did Zurich, Amsterdam and London in 2 days, then I was sent back to Dubai - COMMERCIAL - which was horrible. The schedule was extended and my boss knew if they brought me, they would be bringing back a dead body to Dubai. I was exhausted, but had a very interesting time.
